description: ID Card — living credential for Mantas Lilis with a distant particle void, animated flow-field surface, mouse-reactive 3D tilt and sheen, randomized serial, generated barcode, and issued date stamp

Video Index — a grid of every previous sketch as a 3–4 second looping clip, recorded by a headless Chromium running Playwright scenarios that an LLM agent authored from each sketch's source; ffmpeg trims warmup and transcodes to MP4 + poster, mobile gets single-stream centered playback, reduced-motion gets a posters-only fallback

Z-Axis — nine micro-explorations of depth as a UI material (two-state toggle, stacked deck, modal lift, z-scroll, hover grid, pressed state, layer explode, parallax cursor, notification arrival) switched via a floating island controller with prev/next, dot indicators, and arrow-key navigation

Idle States — eight visual interpretations of idle/patience as a 2×2 typology across two pages (ambient + instrumented): breath, caret, drift, lean-toward, hover, orbit, listening bars, elapsed counter; each paired with claim/signal/motion/risk metadata, switched via a floating pill dock

ASCII Sheets — promotional showcase for the ASCII sheet primitive: hero with auto-cycling filters, twelve live use-case tiles (header, modal, toast, divider, drawer, image-reveal, marquee, tooltip, etc.), five-formula gallery, and glyph + palette rails that retheme the hero on click
Interactive entropy visualization with animated particles
Vicsek model flocking behavior simulation
Particle clustering with chaotic agents
Stochastic random walk patterns on canvas
Gravity and particle physics with falling objects
Celestial mechanics with orbital planets
Apophenia proximity links on grid
Cluster detection with parameter tuning
Linked agents network visualization
Audio-reactive agents with spatial positioning
Interactive message storage system (Node.js/Express)
Perlin noise wind simulation
Wave pattern generation with ripple effects
Dynamic cluster visualization with signals
Interactive 2D grid navigation with zoom
Grid camera variant
Force graph visualization
Text-to-speech with animated typography
Conway's Game of Life variant
Force-directed graph of coworker interactions (React/D3)
Schelling model of segregation simulation
30-day agent interaction heatmap
Graph network visualization
Touch/mouse event handler demo
Rock paper scissors game
Density and color-controlled particle effect
Dynamic widget dashboard layout
Muse v0 - music/creative tool prototype
Liquid glass morphism effect
Text generation UI showing thinking states
Experimental loading indicators exploring thinking metaphors
CLI material color palette
Chaotic entropy pattern generation
Temporal slitscan imaging effect
Text morphing with particle transitions
Great circle flight path animation (Leaflet/Turf.js)
Vite React TypeScript project
Real-time text sentiment analysis with industrial visualization (React/TypeScript)
Generative Baltic pattern
Morphing wave patterns
Cube grid rules engine
Metaball physics and animation
Grid-based metaball effects
Sketch project
Whiff project
Gravity pills particle simulation
OKLCH vs HSL gradient comparison
Sketch project
Grid Trace - Interactive grid path visualization with Geist Pixel font
Execution Trace Graph - AI response visualized as a traversal through a skill graph
Resonant Lattice - Interactive physics grid with mass-spring damper nodes
Reaction-Diffusion - Gray-Scott model simulation with interactive parameter controls
ASCII Animated Grid - Hypnotic 100x100 text grid with 5 distinct physical simulation modes
Interactive force-directed graph visualizing relationships between projects and data concepts
ASCII Loading — dual-grid crystallization animation with face emergence and progress bar
Constrained Variation — fix the scaffold, switch the algorithm, compare simultaneously
Five chapters, three palettes: Peach, Clay, and Aus — same sketch system remapped through different color identities
Geometric shapes explorer — lines, arcs, and curves organized into chapters with animated parameter tweaking
Font Explorer — skill to visualize any font
Agentic Patterns — interactive reference for AI agent design patterns
Human in the Loop — four patterns across a single autonomy axis
Terminal REPL — minimal shell interface with boot sequence, command streaming, and ASCII cat
Ube Kaizen — enter 3 colors and explore them as accents, tints, blends, data viz, and typographic pairings
Viz Grouped — reference gallery of visualization types grouped by analytical goal
Mode Toggle — component reference sheet exploring a binary toggle across 9 families, composed examples, and 10 input combinations
ASCII Field Gallery — 8 animated ASCII wave fields rendered on canvas, each a distinct sine/cosine interference formula through a dot-density glyph ramp
Audio Reactive ASCII Field — ube wave field driven by microphone input; 8 character vocabularies, floating control bar, settings modal for reactivity tuning
Moog Phase — XY phase portrait of a Moog sequence; WAV player with looped playback, snapshot export, and friction-reactive ASCII field banner
Clear Channel — visual language reference: design tokens, typography scale, spacing, motion, and live component demos for the computational aesthetics system
Clear Channel — introduction: a design system for computational aesthetics; working with data as raw material
Index — 100 days landing page: glyph thumbnail grid with live animated per-project glyphs and theme tags
Snapshots v2 — photo gallery reimagined through the Clear Channel system: square year-grouped tiles with ASCII glyph loaders (chaos → settling → locked) and chaotic bursty image loading
SVG Layouts — schematic inline-SVG mockups of agent and code workspaces; takes carousel, CSS-variable theme system, and choreographed panel/streaming animations

Particles — soft dots drifting on multi-harmonic sinusoidal paths that pause and recoil on contact; floating variant control with a metaball mode that fuses blobs via additive blending and a contrast() alpha threshold
Layout Playground — a low-fidelity sandbox for layout-system exploration; macOS-style shell with a floating sidebar, centered canvas, and tool window, all wireframed to focus on structure

Layout Depth — depth-model variant of the layout playground; raised central card with side panels dissolved into the background so only their icons float on the shell, plus a drag-to-resize right window
ASCII Sheet Documentation — promotional component showcase for a fixed ASCII texture and backdrop-filter banner, with scroll-reactive use cases, presets, and config snapshot

Network — D3 force-directed graph with four relationship types (follows, friends, mentions, blocked) encoded by color, width, dash, and arrow; same-pair edges fan out as symmetric quadratic curves and a legend toggles each layer, reheating the simulation so the layout re-settles

Lens Wave — WebGL fragment shader that warps a live text texture through layered sine displacement, non-uniform lens scaling, chromatic aberration, and a tinted multi-tap bloom; floating control island edits the text, snap freezes a frame onto a sweater mockup, and export composites the full-res PNG
